narrative:
Precinct Piqua 4-A (precinct in Miami County) has 812 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
